[Blog](https://www.kore1.com/workforce-blog/) * [Contact](https://www.kore1.com/staffing-solutions-contact/) * [949-706-6990](tel:949-706-6990) ![KORE1 staffing professionals in a modern office](https://www.kore1.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/kore1_hero.webp) # The Right Hire. _The First Time._ KORE1 connects you to proven professionals through long-standing industry relationships, deep talent networks, and precision-driven recruiting strategies. We focus on alignment, performance, and long-term fit so you can hire with confidence. [Find Talent →](https://www.kore1.com/staffing-solutions-contact/) [Search Jobs →](https://search10.smartsearchonline.com/koreone/jobs/) 30+ Years Experience 8 Industry Sectors 3 Delivery Models Nationwide Coverage The Problem ## Hiring Shouldn’t Feel Like Guesswork You don’t need more résumés. You need the right person. Instead, you get stacks of applicants who aren’t aligned, agencies pushing speed over fit, interviews that waste your team’s time, and pressure to decide before you’re confident. And when it goes wrong, it’s expensive. A bad hire costs productivity. It drains morale. It forces you to start over. You can’t afford that — and you shouldn’t have to. Experience Changes the Outcome ## How We Support Your Hiring Whether you’re building a team, filling a critical role, or scaling fast, we support you through three proven models. ### Direct Hire Permanent placements for roles that drive long-term impact. We source, vet, and deliver professionals who align with your team and your trajectory. [Learn More ](https://www.kore1.com/direct-hire-staffing/) ### Contract Staffing Flexible talent for peak demand, specialized skill gaps, and project-based needs — without long-term overhead. [Learn More ](https://www.kore1.com/contract-staffing/) ### Project-Based Teams Dedicated teams assembled around defined outcomes. Built for delivery. Managed for performance. [Learn More ](https://www.kore1.com/project-staffing/) Our Process ## Simple. Focused. Built to Reduce Risk. Every search is designed around one question: will this person still be a strong decision 12 months from now? 1 ### Get Clear We dig into the real need. Not just the job description — the business goal, the team dynamic, the leadership style. 2 ### Activate the Right Network We combine deep relationships with AI-driven precision to identify strong-fit professionals — not just cold sourcing. 3 ### Present a Focused Slate Not 20 résumés. A small group of aligned, vetted candidates who make sense for your team and your goals. 4 ### Stay Engaged We don’t disappear after the offer. We stay close to protect the outcome and ensure long-term success. The Real Cost ## A Bad Hire Is Expensive Not just salary. We recruit with the full cost in mind — and every search runs through one filter: will this person still be a strong decision 12 months from now? ### Lost Productivity The wrong hire slows down the team from day one, costing weeks of ramp-up with no return. ### Delayed Projects Critical initiatives stall when the person in the seat can’t deliver on scope or timeline. ### Team Disruption Morale drops when the rest of the team has to compensate for a misaligned hire. ### Restart Costs Starting the recruiting process over means double the spend and double the lost time. ### Opportunity Cost Every month with the wrong person is a month your competitors are pulling ahead. Our Specialties ## Breadth Matters. But Depth Wins. ### Technology & Digital Cloud architects, DevOps engineers, cybersecurity, AI/ML engineers, data engineers, and full-stack developers. CloudDevOpsAI/MLSecurity ### Engineering & Manufacturing Mechanical, electrical, biomedical, and systems engineers for R&D, manufacturing, and product development. MechanicalElectricalBiomedical ### Accounting & Finance Controllers, fractional CFOs, financial analysts, and senior accounting professionals for growing businesses. CFOControllerNetSuite ### Healthcare & Life Sciences EHR implementation specialists, clinical informatics, health data analysts, and compliance-focused professionals. EHR/EMRInformaticsHIPAA ### Creative & Marketing UX/UI designers, content strategists, marketing technologists, and creative directors for digital channels. UX/UIContentMarTech ### Human Resources & Operations HR business partners, operations managers, and organizational development specialists who keep teams running. HRBPOperationsOD ### Industrial & Skilled Trades Warehouse management, logistics coordinators, production supervisors, and skilled tradespeople nationwide. LogisticsWarehouseProduction Where We Work ## Southern California Staffing, Rooted Locally KORE1 is headquartered in Irvine and serves companies across Southern California. Our recruiters live and work in the markets they cover. [ 📍Orange County Irvine HQ. IT, engineering, accounting, and professional staffing across OC. ](https://www.kore1.com/staffing-agency-orange-county/) [ 📍Los Angeles Downtown, Westside, Valley, and beyond. Full-service staffing for LA companies. ](https://www.kore1.com/staffing-agency-los-angeles/) [ 📍San Diego Biotech, defense, and tech staffing throughout the San Diego metro area. ](https://www.kore1.com/staffing-agency-san-diego/) Why KORE1 ## Deep Talent Bench. Not Just Cold Sourcing. When you engage KORE1, you’re not funding a blind hunt. You’re gaining access to established industry relationships, an active bench of proven professionals, candidates we’ve worked with before, and talent connected through real community involvement. We’ve invested heavily in AI to improve targeting and alignment — it helps us narrow faster and see patterns. But tech doesn’t replace experience. Data supports the decision. Our judgment makes the call. That’s how you get precision without losing nuance. [About KORE1 →](https://www.kore1.com/why-kore1/) “KORE1 doesn’t just understand our technical requirements — they understand our culture. Every candidate they’ve placed has been a strong fit, and their responsiveness is unmatched.” Enterprise Client Healthcare IT Division 30+ Years 100% Partnership Focus 52+ 5-Star Reviews ## When You Hire Right, Everything Moves Faster Projects stabilize. Leaders breathe easier. Teams perform better. That’s what happens when precision replaces noise. Tell us what you’re hiring for — we’ll help you do it right. [Speak to a KORE1 Recruiter →](https://www.kore1.com/staffing-solutions-contact/) [Search Jobs →](https://search10.smartsearchonline.com/koreone/jobs/) KORE1 Connecting businesses with specialized IT, engineering, and finance talent since 2005. 36 Discovery, Ste 220 Irvine, CA 92618 [(949) 706-6990](tel:+19497066990) info@kore1.com #### Solutions [Direct Hire](https://www.kore1.com/direct-hire-staffing/)[Contract](https://www.kore1.com/contract-staffing/)[Project](https://www.kore1.com/project-staffing/) #### Company [Why KORE1](https://www.kore1.com/why-kore1/)[Our Team](https://www.kore1.com/our-team/)[Blog](https://www.kore1.com/workforce-blog/)[Contact Us](https://www.kore1.com/staffing-solutions-contact/) © 2026 KORE1.
